queue_item.action: Add stateful replay rejection to the signed GitHub OIDC evidence chain without persisting raw identity tokens.

progress.finding: A signed and authorized JWT can still be replayed while valid; reject repeated issuer-plus-jti acceptance using bounded retained state.
progress.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed in the execution runtime using the exact committed source and test contents.

queue_item.handoff: Cloudflare Research should place the replay gate after runGitHubOidcEvidence acceptance and before deployment/evidence promotion, backed by an atomic durable store. The workflow must reject a duplicate issuer-jti transaction even under concurrency.

trust_limit: This additive projection records Frontier Research output and does not prove canonical queue consolidation, workflow integration, peer execution, or deployment success.
